The '''''Moonshadow''''' was an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] operated by the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
It was commanded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Kir Vantai]] and was often paired with the ''[[Swift Liberty]]'', commanded in turn by Admiral [[Areta Bell]].

At the [[Battle of Liinade III]], it served as the home base for a wing of [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Horton Salm/Legends|Horton Salm]]. The vessel also delivered the brunt of the damage to the [[Ciutric Hegemony]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Direption]]'' before the ''[[Freedom]]'', under [[Sair Yonka]], [[Hyperdrive/Legends|jumped]] [[Realspace/Legends|into]] the engagement and dealt the final blow to the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]''
